info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/oauth/client/%7BclientId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/oauth/client/%7BclientId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/oauth/client/%7BclientId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/oauth/client/%7BclientId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/oauth/client/%7BclientId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"clientId":"string","name":"string","secrets":[{"id":"string","secret":"string","lastUsedTime":"string"}],"scopes":["string"],"logo":"http://example.com","homepage":"http://example.com","redirectUris":["http://example.com"]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"clientId\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\",\"secrets\":[{\"id\":\"string\",\"secret\":\"string\",\"lastUsedTime\":\"string\"}],\"scopes\":[\"string\"],\"logo\":\"http://example.com\",\"homepage\":\"http://example.com\",\"redirectUris\":[\"http://example.com\"]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/oauth/client/%7BclientId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/oauth/client \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","description":"string","homepage":"http://example.com","logo":"string","scopes":["table|create"],"redirectUris":["http://example.com"]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"homepage\":\"http://example.com\",\"logo\":\"string\",\"scopes\":[\"table|create\"],\"redirectUris\":[\"http://example.com\"]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/oauth/client", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get the list of OAuth applications

200.description: Returns the list of OAuth applications

get.description: Get the list of authorized applications

200.description: Returns the list of authorized applications

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/oauth/client/authorized/list \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/oauth/client/authorized/list", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
